channel.title: Abouts on ABQ Info
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on ABQ Info

item.title: Submit Documents
item.description:
Submit documents#

Email info [at] abqinfo [dot] com to submit documentation to the site.

Information that is not available on cabq.gov or other public sites is prioritized.

For easiest transmission, upload documents to your Google Drive, set sharing to Anyone with the link, and send the link.
